title: Faded Band Tee
description: Vintage faded graphic band tee with cracked screen print. Soft, broken-in cotton with a relaxed boxy fit.

title: Nirvana Smiley Tour Tee
description: Reissue vintage-style graphic tee with the classic smiley print on front and tour dates on back.

title: Vintage Champion Spellout Tee
description: Heavyweight vintage Champion graphic tee with a faded spellout logo across the chest.

title: Y2K Baby Tee
description: Cropped Y2K baby tee with a small glittery graphic. Tight ribbed fit.

title: Skate Graphic Tee
description: Boxy vintage skate brand graphic tee with a bold back print. Oversized fit.

title: Levi's 501 Vintage Jeans
description: Classic vintage Levi's 501 straight-leg jeans with honest fading and a worn-in feel.

title: Wide-Leg Baggy Jeans
description: Heavy wide-leg baggy jeans with a high rise and puddling hem. Skater-friendly drape.

title: Carpenter Denim Pants
description: Y2K carpenter jeans with utility loops and a relaxed straight leg.

title: High-Waist Mom Jeans
description: Vintage high-waist mom jeans with a tapered ankle and rigid denim.

title: Carhartt Detroit Jacket
description: Worn-in Carhartt Detroit workwear jacket with blanket lining and broken-in canvas.

title: Vintage Denim Jacket
description: Classic 90s vintage denim trucker jacket with a slightly cropped boxy fit.

title: Leather Bomber Jacket
description: Soft black leather bomber with ribbed cuffs and a clean minimal silhouette.

title: Vintage Varsity Jacket
description: Wool-body vintage varsity jacket with leather sleeves and chenille letter patch.

title: Platform Dr. Martens
description: Chunky platform Dr. Martens with the classic 90s grunge silhouette. Light scuffing.

title: Chunky New Balance 9060
description: Y2K-leaning chunky New Balance dad sneakers with a layered grey upper.

title: Converse Chuck 70 High
description: Classic high-top Converse Chuck 70 with a vintage off-white midsole.

title: Adidas Samba OG
description: Low-profile Adidas Samba sneakers, lightly worn, with the classic gum sole.

title: Vintage Wool Cardigan
description: Cozy vintage wool grandpa cardigan with leather buttons and a relaxed fit.

title: Striped Knit Sweater
description: Preppy striped cotton knit sweater with a crew neck and trim fit.

title: Oversized Cable Knit
description: Chunky oversized cable-knit sweater, great for layering, with a slouchy drape.

title: Floral Slip Dress
description: 90s floral slip dress with thin straps and a bias-cut midi length. Layers well over a tee.

title: Y2K Mesh Mini Dress
description: Y2K mesh-overlay mini dress with a fitted silhouette and ruched side.

title: Plaid Pleated Mini Skirt
description: Y2K plaid pleated mini skirt with a low waist. Schoolgirl-core staple.

title: Denim Maxi Skirt
description: Long denim maxi skirt with a back slit and a vintage mid-wash. High-waisted.
